n: Chapter 10.3: Leave The City Behind, Part One

steps.t: The leaders of the Kindred await your assistance with their preparations in the Meeting-hall of Dâr Laja.
The leaders of the Kindred await your assistance in the Meeting-hall of Dâr Laja.
The Kindred of the Coins have given you orders to deliver to a number of people at various locations within the city: Bith Gabâr, the forum in the Upp…
Sirgon is by the east gate of Umbar Baharbêl, preparing to depart the city.
